---
title: ""
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<!-- HERO -->
<div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg,#0d2b45,#1a4a6e); color:white; padding:1rem 1rem;">
  <div style="max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto;">

    <p style="color:#c8d8e8;">Tika Ram Gurung · Updated May 2026</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- TWO COLUMN LAYOUT -->
<div style="max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; display:grid; grid-template-columns:200px 1fr; gap:1rem; padding:1rem 1rem;">

  <!-- PROFILE SIDEBAR -->
  <div>
    <div class="profile-card">
      <img src="figures/Tika_Face.JPG" alt="Tika Ram Gurung"/>
      <div class="profile-name">Tika Ram Gurung</div>
    <div class="profile-role">Ph.D. Candidate<br/>University of Nebraska-Lincoln</div>
     
<ul class="profile-links">
  <li>📍 Lincoln, NE</li>
  <li>✉️ <a href="mailto:tikargrg@gmail.com">tikargrg@gmail.com</a></li>
  <li><a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Tika-Ram-Gurung" target="_blank"><img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/5/5e/ResearchGate_icon_SVG.svg" width="16" height="16" style="vertical-align:middle; margin-right:4px;"/> ResearchGate</a></li>
  <li><a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=TMxdLn0AAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank"><img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/c/c7/Google_Scholar_logo.svg" width="16" height="16" style="vertical-align:middle; margin-right:4px;"/> Google Scholar</a></li>
  <li><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/tika-ram-gurung-55a743a3/" target="_blank"><img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/c/ca/LinkedIn_logo_initials.png" width="16" height="16" style="vertical-align:middle; margin-right:4px;"/> LinkedIn</a></li>
  <li><a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4287-6150" target="_blank"><img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/06/ORCID_iD.svg" width="16" height="16" style="vertical-align:middle; margin-right:4px;"/> ORCID</a></li>
  <li><a href="https://x.com/TR_Gurung" target="_blank"><img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/5/53/X_logo_2023_original.svg" width="16" height="16" style="vertical-align:middle; margin-right:4px;"/> X / Twitter</a></li>
</ul>


    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- MAIN CONTENT -->
  <div>

    <!-- PDF Preview -->
    <iframe src="CV_Tika_Gurung.pdf"
            width="100%"
            height="225px"
            style="border:none; border-radius:8px; box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); pointer-events:yes; margin-bottom:2rem;">
    </iframe>
    <p style="font-size:0.82rem; color:#718096; text-align:center; margin-top:-1.5rem; margin-bottom:1rem; font-style:italic;">
    </p>

    <!-- Education -->
    <div class="section-title">Education</div>
    <br/>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">2023 – Present</div>
      <div class="timeline-title">Ph.D. Candidate · Climatology/Meteorology</div>
      <div class="timeline-sub">University of Nebraska-Lincoln · Expected Summer 2026</div>
      <div class="timeline-sub" style="margin-top:0.3rem; font-style:italic;">Dissertation: High-Resolution Climate Simulations and Impacts of Local Human Factors on Hydroclimate and Glacier Dynamics in High Mountain Asia</div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">2013 – 2015</div>
      <div class="timeline-title">M.S. in Glaciology</div>
      <div class="timeline-sub">Kathmandu University, Nepal</div>
      <div class="timeline-sub" style="margin-top:0.3rem; font-style:italic;">Thesis: Reconstruction of annual mass balance of Rikha Samba Glacier (1995–2013) using Energy-Mass Balance Model</div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">2009 – 2013</div>
      <div class="timeline-title">B.Sc. in Environmental Science (Hons)</div>
      <div class="timeline-sub">Kathmandu University, Nepal</div>
    </div>

    <!-- Work Experience -->
    <div class="section-title" style="margin-top:2.5rem;">Work Experience</div>
    <br/>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">2021 – 2022 &amp; 2016 – 2020</div>
      <div class="timeline-title">Research Associate / Cryosphere Analyst</div>
      <div class="timeline-sub">ICIMOD (International Centre for Integrated Mountain Development)</div>
      <p style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#4a5568; margin-top:0.4rem; line-height:1.65;">
        Led glacier monitoring expeditions across 20 glaciers. Installed and maintained automatic weather stations, rain gauges, and temperature loggers. Conducted dGPS surveys and contributed to capacity building in Afghanistan, Bhutan, India, and Pakistan.
      </p>
    </div>

    <!-- Skills -->
    <div class="section-title" style="margin-top:2.5rem;">Skills</div>
    <br/>
    <p style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#4a5568; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Coding &amp; Analysis</p>
    <p style="font-size:0.83rem; color:#4a5568; margin-bottom:0.8rem;">R · Python · MATLAB · GIS · GitHub · Linux / HPC</p>
    <p style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#4a5568; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Numerical Models</p>
    <p style="font-size:0.83rem; color:#4a5568; margin-bottom:0.8rem;">WRF · MPAS · Energy-Mass Balance Glacier Model</p>
    <p style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#4a5568; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Field Monitoring</p>
    <p style="font-size:0.83rem; color:#4a5568; margin-bottom:0.8rem;">AWS installation/maintenance · dGPS · Rain gauge · Field logistics</p>
    <p style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#4a5568; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Languages</p>
    <p style="font-size:0.83rem; color:#4a5568;">Nepali (native) · English (fluent) · Hindi (excellent) · Urdu (good)</p>

    <!-- Awards -->
    <div class="section-title" style="margin-top:2.5rem;">Awards &amp; Fellowships</div>
    <br/>
    <div class="award-item">
      <div class="award-icon">🏆</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-weight:600; color:#1a4a6e; font-size:0.95rem;">Outstanding Graduate Award 2024</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#4a5568;">Department of Earth and Atmospheric Sciences, UNL</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="award-item">
      <div class="award-icon">💧</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-weight:600; color:#1a4a6e; font-size:0.95rem;">Daugherty Water for Food Global Institute Graduate Research Award 2024/2025</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#4a5568;">University of Nebraska</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="award-item">
      <div class="award-icon">🎓</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-weight:600; color:#1a4a6e; font-size:0.95rem;">CMP-Funded M.S. Scholar (2013–2015)</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.85rem; color:#4a5568;">Cryosphere Monitoring Project, Kathmandu University</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Memberships -->
    <div class="section-title" style="margin-top:2.5rem;">Memberships</div>
    <br/>
    <p style="font-size:0.83rem; color:#4a5568; line-height:1.9;">
      American Geophysical Union · American Meteorological Society · Nebraska Academy of Sciences · European Geophysical Union
    </p>

    <!-- Recent Conferences -->
    <div class="section-title" style="margin-top:2.5rem;">Recent Conferences</div>
    <br/>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">April 2026 · NAS Lincoln</div>
      <div class="timeline-title">From Lowlands to Mountains: Irrigation Impacts on South Asian Hydroclimate</div>
      <div class="timeline-sub">Poster · 136th Annual Meeting, Nebraska Academy of Sciences</div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">January 2026 · AMS Houston</div>
      <div class="timeline-title">Potential Impacts of Irrigation on Hydroclimatic Variability over HMA</div>
      <div class="timeline-sub">Poster · 106th Annual Meeting, American Meteorological Society</div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">December 2024 · AGU Washington D.C.</div>
      <div class="timeline-title">High-resolution climate simulations of HMA</div>
      <div class="timeline-sub">Poster · AGU Annual Meeting</div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">December 2023 · AGU San Francisco</div>
      <div class="timeline-title">Understanding the Influence of Soil Moisture on Heatwave Characteristics in the US</div>
      <div class="timeline-sub">Poster · AGU Fall Meeting</div>
    </div>

    <!-- Recent Publications -->
    <div class="section-title" style="margin-top:2.5rem;">Recent Publications</div>
    <br/>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">2026 · Climate Dynamics</div>
      <div class="timeline-title">Evaluating the performance of high-resolution climate simulations over the Central Himalaya and Karakoram</div>
      <div class="timeline-sub">Gurung, T.R., Chen, L., Ali, S.H., Rowe, C., Arriola, F.M. and Ritzema, R.S.</div>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00382-025-08030-x" target="_blank" style="font-size:0.82rem; color:#2e86ab; font-weight:600;">DOI →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">2025 · Journal of Glaciology</div>
      <div class="timeline-title">Modelling seasonal fluctuations and aspect characteristics of ice-cliff melt on the debris-covered Trakarding Glacier</div>
      <div class="timeline-sub">Sato, Y., Buri, P., ... Gurung, T.R., et al.</div>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1017/jog.2025.17" target="_blank" style="font-size:0.82rem; color:#2e86ab; font-weight:600;">DOI →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-year">2024 · Environmental Research Letters</div>
      <div class="timeline-title">Understanding the influence of soil moisture on heatwave characteristics in the contiguous United States</div>
      <div class="timeline-sub">Gurung, T.R. and Chen, L.</div>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1088/1748-9326/ad4dbb" target="_blank" style="font-size:0.82rem; color:#2e86ab; font-weight:600;">DOI →</a>
    </div>
    <p style="margin-top:2.5rem;">
      <a href="publications.html" style="color:#2e86ab; font-weight:600; font-size:0.88rem;">See all publications →</a>
    </p>

  </div>
</div>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <p>© 2026 Tika Ram Gurung · University of Nebraska-Lincoln</p>
</footer>
` ``
```
